race.comment: MISS WALL STREET (4) was beaten 2 lengths in a 1600m contest at Belmont Park a week-and-a-half ago after being prominent at the bend. Was building nicely into that and the longer trip shouldn't bother. Gets in well with the 3kg claim and is ideally placed to win. BAYHARA (3) lines up on the back of a 2.25 lengths defeat at over 1800m at Ascot. Jut missed here this trip prior and with Faithfull aboard will be tough to beat back home in lesser grade. BUTTERFLYROCK (2) comes out of the same race at Ascot and was safely held. Impressed missing a nose here prior finishing just ahead of the above, and a 3kg claimer replaces Faithfull. MIFF MUFFERED MOOF (5) was good in the same race but plainer back to a mile following. TRUEVINSKY (1) was outgraded at the provincials last time but raced well here the one prior. In the mix.
